description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in SkinTech phpNewsManager 1.48 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via unspecified parameters, possibly (1) id and (2) topicid, in (a) browse.php, (b) category.php, (c) gallery.php, (d) poll.php, and (e) possibly other unspecified scripts.  NOTE: portions of the description details are obtained from third party information.
